title: DateTimeField
description: Combined date and time input with a calendar popover and built-in time picker.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Combined date and time picker using 24-hour format by default.

format12h.title: 12-hour format
format12h.desc: Switch the time picker to AM/PM format with format='12h'.

minMax.title: Min and max
minMax.desc: Restrict the range using minDate and maxDate applied to both date and time.

clearable.title: Clearable
clearable.desc: An ✕ button is visible when a value is set to clear the selection.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: The field dims and prevents opening the popover.

props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Text shown when there is no value.
props.step: Minute granularity in the time picker.
props.showSeconds: Shows a seconds column in the time picker.
props.clearable: Shows a button to clear the value.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the value is selected or cleared.
emits.clear: Emitted when the value is cleared.
